title: Affirm Holdings Q1 Earnings Projections
text: Affirm Holdings (AFRM) Q1 Earnings Projections. Key Consensus Estimates: Wall Street analysts project Affirm Holdings will report Q1 earnings of $0.08 per share, which represents an increase of 109.3% year over year. Revenue estimates stand at $444.94 million, reflecting 23% growth from the same quarter last year. Notable Metric Forecasts: The analysis highlights several specific revenue streams analysts are monitoring. Interest Income: Projected at $230 million, indicating a substantial 68.1% increase year-over-year. Merchant Network Revenue: Expected to reach $132.15 million, up 16.8% from the prior year. Virtual Card Network Revenue: Forecasted at $32.28 million, growing 20.9%. Gain on Sales of Loans: Anticipated at $29.05 million, though this represents a -54.3% decline from last year. Servicing Income: Estimated at $22.69 million, up 6.2%. Stock Performance Outlook: The report notes that over the past month, AFRM will likely exhibit a performance that aligns with the overall market in the upcoming period, based on its current analyst ranking.
